&control

  calculation   = 'relax',
  restart_mode  = 'from_scratch',

/
&electrons
conv_thr = 1e-08

!startingwfc = 'random'
/
&ions
  ion_dynamics      = 'bfgs',
  upscale       = 100.,
/
